no_skills: No-skills: repeatedly clicks tools/layers and drags from the image area, often affecting or targeting the background instead of the text box.
text_only: Text-only: receives the right high-level idea but keeps dragging large distances from the wrong visual anchor, so the target text box is not placed correctly.
multimodal_v9: Multimodal v9: activates the text/object layer, uses the move tool, and drags the text box left while avoiding the background layer.
